title: Secure your cloud data
summary: This learning path helps you leverage the built-in Azure services for securing app data, ensuring that only authorized services and clients have access.

sections.title: Secure your cloud data
sections.summary: This learning path helps you leverage the built-in Azure services for securing app data, ensuring that only authorized services and clients have access.

lessons.title: Secure your Azure Storage account
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Azure Storage provides multilayered security to protect your data with access keys, secure networks, and Advanced Threat Protection monitoring.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-storage-account/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure role-based access control to effectively manage your team's access to Azure resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-resources-with-rbac/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Secure your Azure resources with Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC)

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Secure your cloud data
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Secure your cloud data**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
